data.content: Shipment failed after clean merge validation. Temporary merge commit 8aac41a5c1fa was created in an isolated worktree rooted at origin/main, but git push was blocked by the mandatory pre-push make sanity gate. Failing test: tests/cli_upgrade_notice.rs::stale_upgrade_check_prints_banner_when_stub_reports_newer_version; assertion expected stderr to contain 'Upgrade available: v0.11.0 -> v9.9.9'. origin/main was not updated. Resume from ready_for_implementation by fixing the banner/test mismatch, rerunning make sanity, and reattempting shipment.
